title: Create logging events at the application boundary
scenario: Domain code should stay free of logging setup. Application boundaries can create events with meaningful fields.
instructions: Implement register_attempt_event that records request_id, optional user_id, and success.

hints.body: Keep the Structured request logging code active and implement register_attempt_event that records request_id, optional user_id, and success.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Create logging events at the application boundary is shown below.

completionExplanation: Create logging events at the application boundary now extends the active Structured request logging code with log boundary event. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
